turns.name: CHIEF JUSTICE ROBERTS
turns.text: Justice Alito has the opinion of the Court in two cases this morning.

turns.name: JUSTICE ALITO
turns.text: The first case is Matal versus Tam. This case concerns a provision of the Lanham Act that prohibits the registration of disparaging trademarks. The federal circuit held that this provision violates the free speech clause of the First Amendment and we affirm. I filed an opinion in which all members of the Court join in full and some join in part. Justice Kennedy has filed an opinion concurring in part and concurring in the judgment in which Justices Ginsburg, Sotomayor and Kagan joined. Justice Thomas has filed an opinion concurring in part and concurring in the judgment. Justice Gorsuch has not filed an opinion and in fact, he took no part in the consideration or decision of this case.
